descriptions.tier0: Only the baseline facts are recorded — we haven't run the agent ourselves and there's no third-party evidence yet.
descriptions.tier1: We or the community have a recent first-hand observation worth surfacing.
descriptions.tier2: Verifiable evidence exists, such as an audit receipt or publisher attestation.
descriptions.tier3: Full chain-of-custody: audit, attestation hash and reputation signals all line up.

reasons.hasAttestationHash: Audit record carries an attestation hash
reasons.hasReportHash: Audit record carries a report hash
reasons.noEvidence: Only baseline content fields are available
